needs.summary: Today's OTP auth KPI stats: total OTP requests since midnight, delivery success percentage of today's sends, failed verification count (wrong or expired codes), and rate-limit block count.
needs.filters/actions: Aggregated server-side over the current day (since midnight, Africa/Lagos +01:00 timestamps in fixture); no client parameters.

needs.summary: Daily OTP request volume time series for a trailing 14-day window (inclusive), rendered as a sparkline; screen derives total, daily average and peak client-side.
fields: counts (one integer per day, ordered oldest to newest)
needs.filters/actions: Fixed trailing 14-day window ending today; grouped by day server-side.

needs.summary: Recent OTP requests list, newest first, with per-request delivery outcome from BulkSMSNigeria, verification attempt count, and whether the number is currently rate limited. Phone numbers may arrive masked or be masked client-side, but full digits are needed for digit-substring search.
needs.filters/actions: Filter by delivery status (delivered|pending|failed) or by rate-limited flag ('blocked'); free-text search on phone digit substring. Fixture shows 16 rows; a paged admin list per conventions (?page=&limit= returning {data, page, total}) fits.

needs.summary: List of test-flagged businesses' phone numbers with each number's current OTP state: owning business name, phone, and seconds until the active code expires (or expired). Server-side query must filter on the test-account flag so real users can never appear.
needs.filters/actions: Implicit filter: test-flagged businesses only, enforced server-side per conventions test-account tooling power 2.

needs.summary: Reveal the current OTP code for one test-flagged business's phone (per-row Reveal/Hide toggle). Structurally restricted to test accounts; conventions require the code lookup to filter on the test flag server-side, and as a sensitive superadmin read it should be audit-loggable/on-demand rather than bulk-shipped with the list.
needs.filters/actions: Action: fetch/reveal current code for a single test-number row; refuse for non-test businesses.
